title: scrophularia fontqueri
intro: Scrophularia fontqueri, also known as Font Quer's figwort, is a plant species in the figwort family (Scrophulariaceae) that is native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and is believed to have potential health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. Scrophularia fontqueri is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used in the form of capsules or dried extracts. Research suggests that the plant's bioactive compounds may have therapeutic effects, although further studies are needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human use.
